rows.label: qev016901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome, [ST:playername ].
I've been waiting for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0002
rows.name:
You're the only one who can break through
this situation. Allow me to explain the new mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what happened.

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0021
rows.name:
Try to end the conversation, stating
you want no part in troublesome matters.

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh? Did something bad happen to you?
...Come on, don't say that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0004
rows.name:
I've prepared a reward commensurate with your efforts,
so at least hear me out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Right now, various aliens are immigrating
into NLA, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0006
rows.name:
Thanks to that, we've achieved dramatic technological
progress, and distribution has become active.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0007
rows.name:
However... as a result, the required amount of
Miranium has drastically increased.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0008
rows.name:
The amount we can extract from the current
Data Probes is no longer enough...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Therefore, I want you to procure enough Miranium
to get us out of this predicament.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Also, when you pioneer Valley of Oblivion,
I want to entrust you with a few missions,
just like always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0011
rows.name:
The collection of precious Mine Earthworms
that can be obtained in that location...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0012
rows.name:
And the recovery of Data Unit FN095, which is believed
to have fallen in Valley of Oblivion, are your missions
this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0013
rows.name:
What do you say? With your abilities, I don't think
it'll be a very difficult mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0014
rows.name:
Thank you. I'll let the aliens who were lamenting the
lack of resources know that our ace BLADE will
bring some right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Hehe, I'm not putting pressure on you
or anything, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0030
rows.name: Confidence

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0031
rows.name: Show confidence and make a lighthearted quip.

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0040
rows.name: Tension

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0041
rows.name: Fall silent at the weight of Kirsty's trust.

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0016
rows.name:
You talk big!
But, that's how you have to be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0017
rows.name:
Oh? You're quite cautious despite your abilities.
I'm sure you'll be fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm confident the mission will be a success.
[ST:playername ], I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0019
rows.name:
Thanks as always.
I'll leave the methodology entirely up to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0020
rows.name:
Expand Frontier Net and gather that massive
amount of Miranium I asked for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0021
rows.name:
...As expected. You mean you've already
gathered 2500gm of Miranium?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Thank you. With this, we can distribute enough
Miranium to the aliens living in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0023
rows.name: I'm counting on you for the rest of the missions too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'll immediately send the Miranium you gave me
over to the aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0025
rows.name:
Please clear the remaining missions in Valley of Oblivion
perfectly, just like always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0026
rows.name:
Phew... The Ma-non's greedy desire for
unknown knowledge is incredible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0027
rows.name:
They seem to have taken an interest in Frontier Net,
which collected such a massive amount of Miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0028
rows.name:
It's been like a constant study session with them
coming to hear me talk like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0029
rows.name:
I feel like I've become more of a teacher
than an Operations Manager.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0051
rows.name: Say that it suits her.

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0060
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0061
rows.name: Say that it doesn't suit her.

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0030
rows.name:
Come to think of it, I did give you a lecture
on Frontier Net too, didn't I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Oh, did you forget? About the teacher who taught you
the depth of Frontier Net?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0032
rows.name:
...Hehe, well whatever. Mission accomplished.
Good work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0033
rows.name:
I certainly received the Data Unit as well.
I'll send your reward right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0034
rows.name:
Phew... It seems these people still have no
intention of going home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0035
rows.name:
They've been asking me every little detail, so
I'm a bit tired of explaining, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0036
rows.name:
Hehe, as one of the development members,
there's nothing more to be proud of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0071
rows.name: State that Frontier Net is the pride of Earthlings.

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0080
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0081
rows.name:
Ask deeply about her being one of
the development members.

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0037
rows.name:
I'm glad you said that.
I'm sure my comrades would be happy too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0038
rows.name:
Even though it was highly classified...
I ended up blurting it out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0039
rows.name:
Did I let my guard down because I'm in front of you?
It's a story from the past, just pretend you didn't hear it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Speaking of which, did you know? There seems to be
a Ma-non who exchanges Miranium for cash.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0041
rows.name:
It looks like you can accept the request from the
Quest Board, so why not take a look if you're interested?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0042
rows.name:
Someone as excellent as you should be able
to utilize it well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0090
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0091
rows.name: Hand over 2500gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev016901_JNK0100
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev016901_SEL0101
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev016901_MSG0043
rows.name:
Oh, holding out on me? The aliens are pestering me,
you know. It would help if you hurried.[ST:wait ]
